name: Grilled Sesame Crab Hash
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces lump crabmeat, picked clean, shredded by hand
1 1/2 cups red potatoes, cooked and diced
2 medium roasted red bell peppers, diced
3 tablespoons sesame seeds, ground in a coffee or spice grinder
1 tablespoon light olive oil (not virgin or extra-virgin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill to medium heat.
2. In a large bowl, mix shredded crabmeat, diced potatoes, roasted red bell peppers, beaten egg, Dijon mustard, Worcestershire sauce, ground red pepper, heavy cream, chopped cilantro, lime juice, and season with salt and pepper.
3. Stir in bread crumbs and ground sesame seeds until combined.
4. Add Oriental sesame oil and season with additional salt and pepper.
5. Divide the mixture into equal portions and shape into patties.
6. Place patties on a hot grill and cook for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and heated through.
7. Remove from grill and let cool slightly before serving.
